title.zh: 是否应该推进 AI Agent token-compression / skill packaging 项目？
title.en: Should we push the AI agent token-compression / skill-packaging project?

question.zh: 创始人是否应该在未来 30 天投入主要精力，把 AI Agent token-compression / skill packaging 做成一个面向 Claude Code、Codex 和本地 agent 用户的可收费验证项目，而不是现在直接开发完整 SaaS？
question.en: Should the founder spend the next 30 days turning AI agent token-compression / skill packaging into a paid validation project for Claude Code, Codex, and local-agent users instead of immediately building a full SaaS product?

current_state.zh: 当前已有明确问题感：MCP、工具和 agent workflow 容易造成上下文臃肿、token 浪费、流程难复用。刚完成一次 Business Skill Watch，发现 X 和 GitHub 在 2026 年 4 月下旬出现多条 Claude Code GTM skills、MCP 转 skill、CLI-first GTM 的公开信号。用户本地已经有大量业务、GTM、dbs 和 Jarvis evolution skill/workflow，可用于 dogfood 和案例化。
current_state.en: The current problem signal is clear: MCPs, tools, and agent workflows can create bloated context, token waste, and weak workflow reuse. A Business Skill Watch run found fresh public X and GitHub signals in late April 2026 around Claude Code GTM skills, MCP-to-skill conversion, and CLI-first GTM. The user's local environment already has many business, GTM, dbs, and Jarvis evolution skills/workflows that can be used for dogfooding and case studies.

hypothesis.zh: 存在一批已经使用 Claude Code、Codex、本地 agent 或 GTM skills 的团队，愿意为“把臃肿 MCP / agent workflow 压缩成 lazy-loaded skills 和可复用本地工作台”付费，前 30 天可以拿到至少 3 个设计伙伴承诺和 1 个付费 token audit / workflow packaging 试点。
hypothesis.en: There is a set of teams already using Claude Code, Codex, local agents, or GTM skills who are willing to pay for converting bloated MCP / agent workflows into lazy-loaded skills and reusable local workspaces, and within 30 days the project can secure at least 3 design-partner commitments plus 1 paid token audit / workflow-packaging pilot.

time_horizon.zh: 未来 30 天验证，未来 90 天判断是否产品化
time_horizon.en: 30 days for validation, 90 days for deciding whether to productize

success_metric.zh: 30 天内完成 100 个目标账户 outbound、10 场有效访谈或销售通话、3 个设计伙伴承诺、1 个付费 audit / packaging 试点；同时拿到至少 2 个真实 before/after token footprint 或 workflow reuse 案例。
success_metric.en: Within 30 days: run outbound to 100 target accounts, hold 10 qualified interviews or sales calls, secure 3 design-partner commitments, close 1 paid audit / packaging pilot, and capture at least 2 real before/after token-footprint or workflow-reuse case studies.

domain.zh: AI agent 工具 / 开发者工作流 / GTM 自动化创业决策
domain.en: AI agent tooling / developer workflow / GTM automation startup decision

source_summary.zh: 早期 B2B developer-tool / workflow-tool 项目通常容易获得兴趣反馈，但从兴趣到付费试点存在明显折损。
source_summary.en: Early B2B developer-tool / workflow-tool projects often get interest signals, but there is a large drop-off from interest to paid pilots.

source_summary.zh: Claude Code / Codex skill 生态正在出现，但当前付费预算、买方角色和标准采购路径仍不清晰。
source_summary.en: The Claude Code / Codex skill ecosystem is emerging, but paid budget, buyer roles, and standard procurement paths are still unclear.

name.zh: X 上出现 Claude Code GTM skills 与 MCP 转 skill 的强讨论信号
name.en: X showed strong discussion signals around Claude Code GTM skills and MCP-to-skill conversion

summary.zh: 2026 年 4 月 20-25 日，多条 X 内容讨论 Claude Code GTM skills、CLI-first GTM，以及把 MCP-heavy workflow 转成 skills 以降低 token 使用。单条公开内容提到在 Anthropic marketing/GTM event 向 200 位 founders 和 marketers 展示 Claude Code GTM skills。
summary.en: From April 20-25, 2026, several X posts discussed Claude Code GTM skills, CLI-first GTM, and converting MCP-heavy workflows into skills to reduce token use. One public post mentioned showing Claude Code GTM skills to 200 founders and marketers at an Anthropic marketing/GTM event.

notes.zh: 这是趋势和注意力证据，还不是付费证据。
notes.en: This is trend and attention evidence, not payment evidence.

name.zh: GitHub 出现多个 Claude Code / GTM skill 仓库
name.en: Multiple Claude Code / GTM skill repositories appeared on GitHub

summary.zh: 近期候选仓库包括 sales-skills/sales、getaero-io/gtm-eng-skills、gtmagents/gtm-agents、ColdIQ GTM Skills、gtm-engineer-playbook、gtm-flywheel 等，覆盖 GTM、outbound、signal scoring、customer feedback、growth experiments。
summary.en: Recent candidate repos include sales-skills/sales, getaero-io/gtm-eng-skills, gtmagents/gtm-agents, ColdIQ GTM Skills, gtm-engineer-playbook, and gtm-flywheel, covering GTM, outbound, signal scoring, customer feedback, and growth experiments.

notes.zh: 供应侧生态在形成，说明可以找到具体 workflow 做 audit；但开源仓库本身也会降低用户付费意愿。
notes.en: A supply-side ecosystem is forming, which creates concrete workflows to audit; open-source repos can also reduce willingness to pay.

name.zh: 用户本地已经有可 dogfood 的复杂 skill / agent 工作台
name.en: The user's local workspace already contains complex skill / agent systems for dogfooding

summary.zh: 本地已安装业务诊断、GTM、销售、定价、竞争情报、dbs、Jarvis evolution 等技能和工作流。这个项目可以先在真实本地工作台上做 token footprint、lazy loading、workflow packaging 的 before/after 案例。
summary.en: The local workspace already includes business diagnosis, GTM, sales, pricing, competitive intelligence, dbs, Jarvis evolution, and related workflows. The project can first produce before/after cases around token footprint, lazy loading, and workflow packaging in a real local workspace.

notes.zh: 这是执行优势和案例优势，不直接证明外部市场会付费。
notes.en: This is an execution and case-study advantage, not direct proof that the external market will pay.

name.zh: 痛点可以被量化成 token footprint、上下文大小和复用率
name.en: The pain can be quantified as token footprint, context size, and reuse rate

summary.zh: 相比泛泛的 agent 咨询，token-compression / skill packaging 可以给出 before/after 指标：提示词长度、加载文件数、运行步骤、上下文占用、重复解释次数、报告生成时间。
summary.en: Compared with generic agent consulting, token-compression / skill packaging can produce before/after metrics: prompt length, loaded file count, execution steps, context footprint, repeated explanation count, and report generation time.

notes.zh: 可量化让试点更容易成交，但仍需要真实客户确认这些指标等于预算。
notes.en: Quantification makes pilots easier to sell, but real customers still need to confirm that these metrics map to budget.

name.zh: 目前还没有直接付费客户或押金信号
name.en: There is no direct paying customer or deposit signal yet

summary.zh: 当前证据主要来自公开趋势、仓库活动、推文和本地 dogfood 条件。尚未看到具体客户为 token audit、workflow packaging 或 skill conversion 支付。
summary.en: Current evidence mostly comes from public trends, repository activity, tweets, and local dogfooding conditions. There is no observed customer payment yet for token audits, workflow packaging, or skill conversion.

notes.zh: 这是当前最关键的负面证据。
notes.en: This is the most important negative evidence right now.

name.zh: 买方和预算路径还没有稳定定义
name.en: The buyer and budget path are not yet stable

summary.zh: 可能买方包括 GTM engineer、AI agency operator、founder、RevOps、developer tooling team。不同买方的预算、话术和成交触发点差异很大。
summary.en: Potential buyers include GTM engineers, AI agency operators, founders, RevOps, and developer tooling teams. Their budgets, messaging, and purchase triggers differ substantially.

notes.zh: 如果 30 天内不收窄 ICP，项目会变成泛 agent 咨询。
notes.en: If the ICP is not narrowed within 30 days, the project will drift into generic agent consulting.

name.zh: 开源 skill 生态会制造替代方案
name.en: The open-source skill ecosystem creates substitutes

summary.zh: 公开 skill 仓库越多，用户越可能先尝试自助复制、手动整理或使用现成模板。项目需要卖“诊断、压缩、治理、迁移和可复用工作台”，而不是只卖 skill 文件。
summary.en: The more open skill repositories exist, the more users may try self-service copying, manual cleanup, or templates. The project needs to sell diagnosis, compression, governance, migration, and reusable workspaces rather than just skill files.

notes.zh: 这会压低纯工具价格，但可能提升高质量迁移服务的价值。
notes.en: This can lower pure-tool pricing while increasing the value of high-quality migration services.

name.zh: 现在直接开发完整 SaaS / 平台
name.en: Build a full SaaS / platform now

name.zh: 先做 30 天设计伙伴验证和付费 token audit
name.en: Run a 30-day design-partner validation and paid token-audit offer first

name.zh: 暂停产品化，只继续观察生态和整理本地案例
name.en: Pause productization and keep observing the ecosystem while organizing local cases

candidates.zh: 在 7 天内列出 100 个目标账户：Claude Code / Codex skill repo 作者、GTM skill repo 作者、AI agency operator、正在讨论 MCP-to-skill 或 token compression 的 X 用户。
candidates.en: Within 7 days, list 100 target accounts: Claude Code / Codex skill repo authors, GTM skill repo authors, AI agency operators, and X users discussing MCP-to-skill or token compression.

candidates.zh: 发出一个具体 offer：免费 20 分钟 agent workflow token audit；付费版本输出 before/after token footprint、skill packaging 方案、迁移 PR 或本地工作台改造。
candidates.en: Send a concrete offer: free 20-minute agent-workflow token audit; paid version delivers before/after token footprint, a skill-packaging plan, a migration PR, or a local workspace refactor.

candidates.zh: 30 天内只看硬指标：10 场有效通话、3 个设计伙伴、1 个付费试点、2 个 before/after 案例。达不到就下调后验并改成内部工具/内容资产路线。
candidates.en: For 30 days, track hard metrics only: 10 qualified calls, 3 design partners, 1 paid pilot, and 2 before/after cases. If missed, lower the posterior and switch to an internal-tool / content-asset path.

initial_problem_statement.zh: 用户希望用 Yao Bayesian Skill 分析 AI Agent token-compression / skill packaging 项目，并帮助做后续决策。
initial_problem_statement.en: The user wants to use Yao Bayesian Skill to analyze the AI agent token-compression / skill-packaging project and support follow-up decisions.

initial_state.zh: 已有公开趋势信号、本地 dogfood 条件和清晰痛点，但缺少真实付费信号、明确买方和稳定 offer。
initial_state.en: There are public trend signals, local dogfooding conditions, and a clear pain point, but no real payment signal, precise buyer, or stable offer yet.

open_questions.zh: 哪一类买方最愿意为 token audit 或 workflow packaging 付费？
open_questions.en: Which buyer segment is most willing to pay for token audits or workflow packaging?

open_questions.zh: before/after token footprint 是否足够打动客户，还是客户更在意交付速度、团队治理或可复用资产？
open_questions.en: Is before/after token footprint persuasive enough, or do customers care more about delivery speed, team governance, or reusable assets?

open_questions.zh: 付费试点的最小成交价应该是 500 美元、2000 美元还是更高？
open_questions.en: Should the minimum paid pilot be priced at $500, $2,000, or higher?

user_input_summary.zh: 用户要求用贝叶斯决策 skill 分析项目并辅助后续决策。
user_input_summary.en: The user asked to analyze the project with the Bayesian decision skill and support follow-up decisions.

assistant_focus.zh: 把模糊项目判断拆成一个 30 天验证决策：做完整产品、做付费试点、暂停观察。
assistant_focus.en: Convert the vague project judgment into a 30-day validation decision: build full product, run paid pilot, or pause and observe.

new_information.zh: 上一轮搜索发现多个 Claude Code / GTM skill 仓库和 X 讨论。
new_information.en: The prior search found multiple Claude Code / GTM skill repositories and X discussions.

new_information.zh: 本地已有足够复杂的 skill / agent 工作台可用于 dogfood。
new_information.en: The local environment already has enough complex skill / agent workflows for dogfooding.

assistant_next_questions.zh: 是否已有任何真实客户愿意付费或承诺试点？
assistant_next_questions.en: Has any real customer agreed to pay or commit to a pilot?

assistant_next_questions.zh: 你更想先卖服务型 token audit，还是先做可自助工具？
assistant_next_questions.en: Do you want to sell a service-style token audit first, or build a self-serve tool first?

remaining_gap.zh: 缺少付费行为、ICP 收窄和真实 before/after 指标。
remaining_gap.en: Missing payment behavior, narrowed ICP, and real before/after metrics.

update_path.zh: 用弱先验加赔率更新处理公开趋势和本地执行证据。
update_path.en: Use a weak prior plus odds updates for public trend and local execution evidence.
